message:
feat(quic): add QUIC/H3 unit protocol matrix and mpsc waker regression test

Add the T4 QUIC/H3 unit-protocol conformance matrix as both a readable
markdown document and a machine-readable JSON artifact. The matrix maps
each T4 sub-bead (T4.1-T4.8) to specific test anchors, scenario IDs,
and required evidence artifacts, providing a single source of truth for
QUIC track conformance coverage.

Add mpsc_waker_bug_test.rs as a regression test for a subtle waker-loss
bug in bounded mpsc channels where a sender's waker could be dropped
without notification when the receiver side closes during a concurrent
send, leaving the sender permanently parked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,169 @@
+# Exhaustive Unit/Protocol Test Matrix: QUIC and HTTP/3 State Machines
+
+**Bead**: `asupersync-2oh2u.4.10` ([T4.10])
+**Generated by**: SapphireHill (claude-code / opus-4.6)
+**Date**: 2026-03-04
+**Dependencies**: T4.2 (QUIC core), T4.3 (flow/congestion), T4.4 (0-RTT/resumption), T4.5 (HTTP/3), T4.6 (interop), T4.7 (soak)
+**Purpose**: Exhaustive unit and protocol tests for QUIC transport, stream management, loss recovery, HTTP/3 frame codec, and control protocol state machines.
+
+---
+
+## 1. Scope
+
+This matrix covers the full T4 implementation surface with deterministic, network-free unit tests:
+
+1. **QUIC Core Codec** (T4.2): ConnectionId, varint, packet header encoding
+2. **Transport State Machine** (T4.3): Connection lifecycle, state transitions
+3. **Stream and Flow Control** (T4.3/T4.4): Per-stream and connection-level credits
+4. **TLS/Key Phase Machine** (T4.4): CryptoLevel progression, key update protocol
+5. **Loss Recovery and RTT** (T4.3): ACK processing, congestion window, PTO
+6. **HTTP/3 Frame Codec** (T4.5): Frame encode/decode, settings validation
+7. **HTTP/3 Control Protocol** (T4.5): Control stream state, pseudo-header validation
+8. **Matrix Validation** (T4.10): Structural checks on this artifact
+
+### 1.1 Module Coverage
+
+| Module | Source | Public Types | Test Prefix |
+|--------|--------|-------------|-------------|
+| quic_core | `src/net/quic_core/mod.rs` | ConnectionId, LongHeader, ShortHeader, PacketHeader | QC |
+| transport | `src/net/quic_native/transport.rs` | QuicTransportMachine, RttEstimator, AckRange, SentPacketMeta | QT |
+| streams | `src/net/quic_native/streams.rs` | StreamTable, QuicStream, FlowCredit, StreamId | QS |
+| tls | `src/net/quic_native/tls.rs` | QuicTlsMachine, CryptoLevel, KeyUpdateEvent | TL |
+| connection | `src/net/quic_native/connection.rs` | NativeQuicConnection, NativeQuicConnectionConfig | NC |
+| h3_native | `src/http/h3_native.rs` | H3Frame, H3Settings, H3ControlState, H3RequestHead, H3ResponseHead | HF |
+| validation | docs + JSON | Structural checks | MV |
+
+---
+
+## 2. Test Categories
+
+### 2.1 QUIC Core Codec (QC)
+
+| ID | Scenario | Assertions |
+|----|----------|------------|
+| QC-01 | ConnectionId::new with valid 0-byte CID | Length 0, empty bytes |
+| QC-02 | ConnectionId::new with valid 20-byte CID | Length 20, bytes match |
+| QC-03 | ConnectionId::new with 21 bytes rejects | Error: InvalidConnectionIdLength |
+| QC-04 | ConnectionId is_empty for 0-length | Returns true |
+| QC-05 | QUIC_VARINT_MAX constant | Equals (1<<62)-1 |
+
+### 2.2 Transport State Machine (QT)
+
+| ID | Scenario | Assertions |
+|----|----------|------------|
+| QT-01 | New transport starts in Idle state | state() == Idle |
+| QT-02 | begin_handshake transitions Idle→Handshaking | State check |
+| QT-03 | on_established transitions Handshaking→Established | State check |
+| QT-04 | begin_handshake from non-Idle fails | Error returned |
+| QT-05 | Initial congestion window is 12000 bytes | congestion_window_bytes() |
+| QT-06 | Initial ssthresh is u64::MAX | ssthresh_bytes() |
+| QT-07 | can_send with 0 in-flight returns true | Congestion window not exhausted |
+| QT-08 | on_packet_sent increments bytes_in_flight | Before/after comparison |
+| QT-09 | RTT estimator starts with no samples | smoothed_rtt_micros() == None |
+| QT-10 | RTT update with first sample sets smoothed_rtt | Value matches sample |
+| QT-11 | RTT update with ack_delay subtraction | Correct accounting |
+| QT-12 | AckRange new with valid range | largest >= smallest |
+| QT-13 | AckRange new with inverted range returns None | Validation check |
+
+### 2.3 Stream and Flow Control (QS)
+
+| ID | Scenario | Assertions |
+|----|----------|------------|
+| QS-01 | FlowCredit new with limit | remaining() == limit, used() == 0 |
+| QS-02 | FlowCredit consume decrements remaining | Correct arithmetic |
+| QS-03 | FlowCredit consume beyond limit returns error | FlowControlError::Exhausted |
+| QS-04 | FlowCredit increase_limit extends capacity | New remaining correct |
+| QS-05 | FlowCredit increase_limit regression fails | FlowControlError::LimitRegression |
+| QS-06 | FlowCredit release increases remaining | Correct accounting |
+| QS-07 | StreamId client bidi stream | Correct encoding (0, 4, 8...) |
+| QS-08 | StreamId server bidi stream | Correct encoding (1, 5, 9...) |
+| QS-09 | StreamId client uni stream | Correct encoding (2, 6, 10...) |
+| QS-10 | StreamId direction detection | Bidi vs Uni |
+| QS-11 | StreamId is_local_for checks | Client/Server perspective |
+| QS-12 | QuicStream write consumes send credit | Credit decremented |
+| QS-13 | QuicStream receive consumes recv credit | Credit decremented |
+| QS-14 | QuicStream set_final_size consistency | Second call with different size fails |
+| QS-15 | QuicStream reset_send sets error code | State updated |
+
+### 2.4 TLS/Key Phase Machine (TL)
+
+| ID | Scenario | Assertions |
+|----|----------|------------|
+| TL-01 | New TLS machine at Initial level | level() == Initial |
+| TL-02 | on_handshake_keys transitions to Handshake | Level check |
+| TL-03 | on_1rtt_keys transitions to OneRtt | Level check |
+| TL-04 | on_handshake_confirmed enables 1-RTT send | can_send_1rtt() == true |
+| TL-05 | 0-RTT disabled by default | can_send_0rtt() == false |
+| TL-06 | enable_resumption then 0-RTT available | can_send_0rtt() == true |
+| TL-07 | request_local_key_update before confirmed fails | Error: HandshakeNotConfirmed |
+| TL-08 | Key update after confirmed succeeds | KeyUpdateEvent::LocalUpdateScheduled |
+| TL-09 | Peer key phase change accepted | KeyUpdateEvent::RemoteUpdateAccepted |
+| TL-10 | Stale peer key phase rejected | Error: StalePeerKeyPhase |
+
+### 2.5 Connection Lifecycle (NC)
+
+| ID | Scenario | Assertions |
+|----|----------|------------|
+| NC-01 | Default config has Client role | Config check |
+| NC-02 | Default max streams = 128 bidi + 128 uni | Config check |
+| NC-03 | Default send/recv window = 1MB | Config check |
+| NC-04 | Default connection limits = 16MB | Config check |
+| NC-05 | Default drain timeout = 3 seconds | Config check |
+| NC-06 | New connection starts in Idle state | State check |
+
+### 2.6 HTTP/3 Frame Codec (HF)
+
+| ID | Scenario | Assertions |
+|----|----------|------------|
+| HF-01 | H3Frame::Data encode/decode round-trip | Payload preserved |
+| HF-02 | H3Frame::Headers encode/decode round-trip | Field block preserved |
+| HF-03 | H3Frame::Settings encode/decode round-trip | All fields preserved |
+| HF-04 | H3Frame::Goaway encode/decode round-trip | Stream ID preserved |
+| HF-05 | H3Frame::CancelPush encode/decode round-trip | Push ID preserved |
+| HF-06 | H3Frame::MaxPushId encode/decode round-trip | Push ID preserved |
+| HF-07 | H3Frame::Unknown encode/decode round-trip | Type and payload preserved |
+| HF-08 | H3Settings duplicate setting rejected | Error: DuplicateSetting |
+| HF-09 | H3ControlState: SETTINGS must be first frame | Protocol check |
+| HF-10 | H3ControlState: DATA on control stream rejected | Error: ControlProtocol |
+| HF-11 | H3RequestHead valid pseudo headers | Method+scheme+path required |
+| HF-12 | H3RequestHead missing :method rejected | Error: InvalidRequestPseudoHeader |
+| HF-13 | H3ResponseHead valid status | 200 accepted |
+| HF-14 | H3ResponseHead invalid status rejected | Error: InvalidResponsePseudoHeader |
+| HF-15 | H3QpackMode default is StaticOnly | Config check |
+
+### 2.7 Matrix Validation (MV)
+
+| ID | Scenario | Assertions |
+|----|----------|------------|
+| MV-01 | JSON artifact has bead_id | asupersync-2oh2u.4.10 |
+| MV-02 | Document has required sections | 8 sections present |
+| MV-03 | All test category prefixes present | QC, QT, QS, TL, NC, HF, MV |
+| MV-04 | Summary test count matches | total_tests matches |
+
+---
+
+## 3. Cumulative T4 Coverage
+
+| Test File | Bead | Tests |
+|-----------|------|-------|
+| `tests/quic_h3_e2e.rs` | T4.2 | ~15 |
+| `tests/quic_h3_e2e_loss.rs` | T4.3 | ~10 |
+| `tests/quic_h3_e2e_cancel.rs` | T4.4 | ~8 |
+| `tests/quic_h3_e2e_h3.rs` | T4.5 | ~10 |
+| `tests/quic_h3_e2e_violations.rs` | T4.5 | ~8 |
+| `tests/tokio_quic_h3_interop_matrix.rs` | T4.6 | ~20 |
+| `tests/tokio_quic_h3_soak_adversarial.rs` | T4.7 | ~24 |
+| `tests/tokio_quic_h3_unit_protocol_matrix.rs` | T4.10 | 64 |
+| **Total** | | **~159** |
+
+---
+
+## 4. Drift Detection
+
+| Rule | Trigger | Action |
+|------|---------|--------|
+| DRIFT-QH1 | New public type in quic_core/quic_native | Add QC/QT/QS/TL test |
+| DRIFT-QH2 | New H3 frame type added | Add HF encode/decode test |
+| DRIFT-QH3 | State machine transition added | Add transition test |
+| DRIFT-QH4 | New flow control error variant | Add boundary test |
+| DRIFT-QH5 | T4.8 observability hooks complete | Add observability unit tests |
